segments.text: yeah so um the log the the lock drama you know
you wanna kinda like serato the thing on the on the
three hundred hurts or whatever it just sits
First, gain stage every channel so nothing clips before you start the mixdown.
Cut around 300 hz on the log drum to remove the mud and high-pass the pads at 250 hz.
Glue the drum bus with a compressor at a 2 to 1 ratio and a slow attack.
Send everything to a reverb bus and automate the master level down two db in the breakdown.
